title: callista tridentifera
intro: Callista tridentifera, also known as the trident snail shell tree or tridentate callista, is a species of sea snail shell-bearing tree found in tropical regions. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Callista tridentifera include reducing fever, alleviating pain, and treating respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and ointments, which can be used topically or taken orally to reap its medicinal benefits.
